home.headline: Fruit design craft for events and digital courses
home.intro: A professional platform for fruit design courses, workshops, and rich visual curriculum.
home.demoCardBody: Authentication and purchase are simulated so you can show the product experience to clients.
home.featuredEmpty: No featured courses yet. Mark a published course as featured in admin.
home.testimonial1: The lessons are clear and the visuals make it easy to follow along at home.
home.testimonial2: Finally a structured path for fruit presentation — great for our catering demos.
home.testimonial3: Perfect for showing clients what premium trays can look like.
home.ctaBandBody: Browse the full catalog or reach out — we will respond when the intake pipeline is live.

login.title: Sign in
login.lead: One place to enter the demo. Choose student for the learning flow or admin for course management.
login.signupLead: Real registration is not wired yet. Create a mock student session with your email (optional), then explore courses and the dashboard.
login.signupHint: Need to manage courses? Switch to the Sign in tab and continue as admin.
login.failed: Sign-in failed. Check your email format or try again.
login.mockDisabled: Mock sign-in is turned off. Set DEMO_MODE=true (or run in development) to enable it.

courses.detailCurriculumHint: Preview lessons are open to everyone. Sign in with a student mock account to unlock every lesson in this demo.
courses.detailNoModules: No modules are published for this course yet.
courses.unlockPrompt: Purchase the course to unlock this lesson.
courses.lessonNoVideo: No video URL is set for this lesson yet.
courses.dashboardLead: Demo access: your student session includes every published course. Pick up where you left off or open the public curriculum anytime.

about.title: About the Fruit Design Academy
about.lead: We showcase the craft of fruit design for events and a professional path for digital learners.
about.visionBody: Make fruit design education more accessible through filmed courses, structured practice, and high-quality visual content.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.lead: Send a message — the form is validated on the client and server (Zod). No real email is sent in the demo phase.
contact.successMessage: Message received (demo). Reference: {reference}. No email is sent at this stage.
